body.name: deez nutz
body.capacity_gap: Follow up on events is falling through the cracks, reminders for registration are not being sent out, drowning in data entry from one app to another
body.biggest_time_sink: Building event schedule manually every time
body.what_falls_through: payments aren't being tracked, correct communication to teams and coaches aren't happening
body.manual_steps: we get an email notification, manually add them to a spreadsheet and create a google calendar entry to remind them that its coming up
body.copy_paste: exporting contact info from salesforce into our payment tracker
body.emails_written: Registration confirmations, reminders and thank yous, summaries to execs
body.reports_created: post event attendance to leadership, news article recap for attendees
body.biggest_pain: Coordinating gym space with local facilities. The back and forth with facility managers takes an entire week
